items.title: AMGEN ANNOUNCES 2026 SECOND QUARTER DIVIDEND
items.description: Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) today announced that its Board of Directors declared a $2.52 per share dividend for the second quarter of 2026. The dividend will be paid on June 5, 2026, to all stockholders of record as of the close of business on May 15, 2026.

items.title: GLP-1 Receptor Agonist Business Analysis Report 2026: Market to Reach $137.4 Billion by 2030 - Clinical Trials Exploring GLP-1 Role in NAFLD and NASH Unlock Future Opportunities
items.author: Researchandmarkets.Com
items.description: The global GLP-1 receptor agonist market is projected to grow from $51.9 billion in 2024 to $137.4 billion by 2030, driven by rising diabetes and obesity prevalence, expanding therapeutic applications beyond metabolic disorders into cardiovascular and neurodegenerative diseases, and innovations in oral formulations and dual-agonist therapies. Key products like Ozempic and Trulicity are expected to lead growth, with China emerging as a major market growing at 23.4% CAGR.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Novo Nordisk is a major player in the GLP-1 market with Ozempic, which is projected to reach $45.4 billion by 2030 with 19.2% CAGR, indicating strong market dominance and growth potential.

Eli Lilly manufactures Mounjaro and other GLP-1 products in a rapidly expanding market projected to reach $137.4 billion by 2030, with strong clinical evidence supporting expansion into new therapeutic areas.
AstraZeneca is positioned in the GLP-1 market with growth opportunities driven by expanding therapeutic applications in cardiovascular disease and other indications beyond diabetes and obesity.
Amgen is featured as a key player in the GLP-1 market with opportunities in the rapidly growing sector benefiting from innovation in drug formulations and expanded indications.
Pfizer is included among major players in the expanding GLP-1 market with significant growth potential driven by rising prevalence of metabolic diseases and therapeutic innovations.
Roche is positioned in the GLP-1 market with opportunities in the high-growth sector driven by innovation and expanding therapeutic applications across multiple disease areas.
